text:
家のような形をしたダーカーが
黒ノ領域で確認されたようだ。

……笑えない冗談だね。
アタシも最初は自分の耳を疑ったよ。

だけど、そんな人を馬鹿にしたような
ダーカーなら心置きなく殺れるだろう。

あんたにも、このふざけた存在の
掃討を手伝ってもらいたい。
頼ん

Apparently, a Falspawn shaped like a
house was verified in the Nightfall
Province. Mmhm.

That's no joke. The first time I heard it, I
thought there was something wrong with
my ears, too.

At the very least, you shouldn't have any
hesitations over killing Falspawn that makes a
fool out of people like that.

I want you to help wipe those ridiculous things
off the plane of existence. I'm counting on you.
